podcasts.name: The Ecom Academy
podcasts.title: This is exactly how I run my whole Shopify store using Claude. For 80% AI, 20% Human #shorts
podcasts.transcript: how I run Shopify stores with Kloud. We do a weekly store performance check-in, so on a Monday morning it gives us all the results of our store, you know, how many sales that we've got, what's winning, what's losing, all those sorts of things. Um, and then we have a content brief for SEO. So, this basically goes and uh does keyword research for us, and it comes up with ideas that we can use for blogs, how we can optimize our page, what our competitors are doing, how we're ranking, and we just do that on a monthly level. And as you can see, each of these here are basically little tasks that run on certain times. And these are just the ones we have running now, and we've only been running these maybe for a couple of weeks. They're all [music] pretty new for us. So, as we learn how to use this more, we just add more tasks in. Once we get more connectors, we add more tasks in.
